---
title: "Week 13: Idiomatic Rust"
---

## Introduction

This week you'll master advanced Rust patterns that make code elegant, efficient, and truly "Rusty". You'll explore three essential patterns used throughout professional codebases: iterators and closures for functional programming, smart pointers for flexible memory management, and idiomatic error handling with Result. These patterns separate beginner Rust from production-ready Rust.

## Recommended readings

- [Chapter 13: Functional language features](https://doc.rust-lang.org/book/ch13-00-functional-features.html) - Iterators and closures
- [Chapter 15: Smart pointers](https://doc.rust-lang.org/book/ch15-00-smart-pointers.html) - Box, Rc, and RefCell

## Lectures

- [**Slides: Idiomatic Rust**](../slides/IS4010_W13_Idiomatic_Rust.qmd)

## Lab assignment

- [Lab 13: Idiomatic Rust](https://github.com/bgreenwell/is4010-rust/blob/main/week13/lab13.md)
